---
title: "StreamCurves - Current Session Appendix"
subtitle: "Detailed Reference Curve Backup"
format:
  pdf:
    documentclass: article
    papersize: letter
    geometry:
      - margin=0.85in
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 2
    number-sections: true
    keep-tex: false
params:
  session_dir: null
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(dplyr)
library(tibble)
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo = FALSE,
  warning = FALSE,
  message = FALSE,
  fig.align = "center",
  out.width = "90%"
)

`%||%` <- function(x, y) {
  if (is.null(x)) y else x
}

if (is.null(params$session_dir) || !dir.exists(params$session_dir)) {
  stop("A valid session_dir parameter is required.")
}

session_dir <- normalizePath(params$session_dir, winslash = "/", mustWork = TRUE)
context_path <- file.path(session_dir, "report_context.rds")
if (!file.exists(context_path)) {
  stop("report_context.rds was not found in session_dir.")
}

ctx <- readRDS(context_path)
session_meta <- ctx$session_meta %||% list()
phase2_summary <- tibble::as_tibble(ctx$phase2_summary %||% tibble())
regional_curves <- tibble::as_tibble(ctx$regional_curves %||% tibble())
decision_history <- tibble::as_tibble(ctx$decision_history %||% tibble())
appendix_metrics <- ctx$metrics %||% list()
```

# Session Summary

- Generated: `r session_meta$generated_at %||% "Unknown"`
- Summary metrics: `r session_meta$metric_count %||% 0`
- Curves ready: `r session_meta$complete_metrics %||% 0`
- Pending metrics: `r session_meta$pending_metrics %||% 0`
- Metrics needing review: `r session_meta$review_metrics %||% 0`

# Completed Metrics

```{r completed-metrics, results='asis'}
completed_metrics <- Filter(function(item) {
  (item$curve_count %||% 0) > 0
}, appendix_metrics)

if (length(completed_metrics) == 0) {
  cat("No completed summary metrics are available in the current session.")
} else {
  for (item in completed_metrics) {
    cat("\n\n## ", item$display_name %||% item$metric, "\n\n", sep = "")
    cat("**Metric key:** `", item$metric, "`  \n", sep = "")
    cat("**Family:** ", item$family %||% "N/A", "  \n", sep = "")
    cat("**Units:** ", item$units %||% "N/A", "  \n", sep = "")
    cat("**Direction:** ", item$direction %||% "Unknown", "  \n", sep = "")
    cat("**Observations:** ", item$n_obs %||% "N/A", "  \n", sep = "")
    cat("**Status:** ", item$status_label %||% "Unknown", "  \n", sep = "")
    cat("**Selected stratification:** ", item$selected_curve_stratification_label %||% "None", "  \n", sep = "")
    cat("**Recommended stratification:** ", item$recommended_curve_stratification_label %||% "None", "  \n", sep = "")
    cat("**Curve summary:** ", item$curve_summary %||% "Not available", "  \n", sep = "")

    if (!is.na(item$manual_curve_label %||% NA_character_)) {
      cat("**Manual curve:** ", item$manual_curve_label, "  \n", sep = "")
    }
    if (!is.na(item$warning_summary %||% NA_character_)) {
      cat("**Warnings:** ", item$warning_summary, "\n\n", sep = "")
    } else {
      cat("\n")
    }

    if (is.data.frame(item$threshold_table) && nrow(item$threshold_table) > 0) {
      cat("\n### Threshold Table\n\n")
      print(knitr::kable(item$threshold_table, format = "latex", booktabs = TRUE, longtable = FALSE))
      cat("\n")
    }

    if (is.data.frame(item$stats_table) && nrow(item$stats_table) > 0) {
      cat("\n### Reference Statistics\n\n")
      print(knitr::kable(item$stats_table, format = "latex", booktabs = TRUE, longtable = FALSE))
      cat("\n")
    }

    plot_file <- item$plot_file %||% NA_character_
    plot_path <- if (!is.na(plot_file) && nzchar(plot_file)) {
      if (grepl("^[A-Za-z]:|^/", plot_file)) {
        plot_file
      } else {
        file.path(session_dir, plot_file)
      }
    } else {
      NA_character_
    }
    if (!is.na(plot_path) && nzchar(plot_path) && file.exists(plot_path)) {
      cat("\n### Curve Plot\n\n")
      knitr::include_graphics(plot_path)
      cat("\n")
    }

    cat("\n\\newpage\n")
  }
}
```

# Incomplete Metrics

```{r incomplete-metrics}
incomplete_tbl <- purrr::map_dfr(appendix_metrics, function(item) {
  tibble(
    Metric = item$display_name %||% item$metric,
    Status = item$status_label %||% "Unknown",
    `Selected Stratification` = item$selected_curve_stratification_label %||% "None",
    Warnings = item$warning_summary %||% NA_character_
  )
}) |>
  filter(Status == "Incomplete")

if (nrow(incomplete_tbl) == 0) {
  cat("No incomplete metrics remain in the current session.")
} else {
  knitr::kable(incomplete_tbl, format = "latex", booktabs = TRUE)
}
```

# Phase 2 Summary

```{r phase2}
if (nrow(phase2_summary) == 0) {
  cat("No current Phase 2 summary is available.")
} else {
  knitr::kable(phase2_summary, format = "latex", booktabs = TRUE, longtable = TRUE)
}
```

# Regional Curves

```{r regional}
if (nrow(regional_curves) == 0) {
  cat("No regional curve outputs are available.")
} else {
  knitr::kable(regional_curves, format = "latex", booktabs = TRUE, longtable = TRUE)
}
```

# Decision History

```{r history}
if (nrow(decision_history) == 0) {
  cat("No decision history entries are available.")
} else {
  knitr::kable(decision_history, format = "latex", booktabs = TRUE, longtable = TRUE)
}
```
